title: Open the Vision Guide Window
description:
Open the Vision Guide Window

Opening the Vision Guide Window

The Vision Guide window is opened from within the Epson RC+ 8.0 development environment.

After Epson RC+ 8.0 has been started, the Vision Guide window can be opened in 2 different ways:

From
		 the main Toolbar:	From
		 the main toolbar in Epson RC+ 8.0 you should see the [Vision]
		 button.  Clicking on the button will open the Vision Guide
		 window.

From
		 the Tools menu:	Selecting
		 [Vision] from the Tools menu will open the Vision Guide window.

Once the Vision Guide window is open we can now begin using Vision Guide 8.0.  The next few pages describe the basic parts of the Vision Guide window.?
